name: @stackra/actions
purpose: Framework action layer — single dispatcher, registry, and middleware pipeline for every side effect (navigate, toast, mutate, upload).
capabilities: Central @Action() registry with typed name-payload contracts
Middleware + pipeline composition around every side effect
One audit surface, one authorization boundary, one test seam
React + React Native bindings for dispatching from components
Testing subpath with mock dispatcher + assertion helpers
when_to_use: Any UI or service needs to trigger a side effect (navigate, mutate, toast, upload) through a single audited pipeline.
when_not_to_use: For pure data reads use @stackra/query; for local state without side effects use @stackra/state directly.
